# pfsense_static_routes (Data Source)

Retrieves all [static routes](https://docs.netgate.com/pfsense/en/latest/routing/static.html). Static routes direct traffic to a specific network through a gateway.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "pfsense_static_routes" "all" {}

output "route_networks" {
  value = [for r in data.pfsense_static_routes.all.routes : r.network]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `routes` (Attributes List) List of static routes. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--routes))

<a id="nestedatt--routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `routes`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) For administrative reference (not parsed).
- `disabled` (Boolean) Disable this static route.
- `gateway` (String) Gateway to use for this static route. Must be the name of a configured gateway.
- `network` (String) Destination network for this static route, in CIDR format.
